mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.inventory_health_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, variant_id, sku, product_id, product_name, available_qty, reserved_qty, low_stock_threshold, stock_status ) SELECT inv.id, inv.tenant, NOW(), inv.variant_id, inv.sku, inv.product_id, COALESCE(p.name, ''), inv.available_quantity, inv.reserved_quantity, inv.low_stock_threshold, CASE WHEN inv.available_quantity = 0 THEN 'OUT_OF_STOCK' WHEN inv.available_quantity < COALESCE(inv.low_stock_threshold, 5) THEN 'LOW_STOCK' ELSE 'IN_STOCK' END FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON inv.product_id = p.id WHERE inv.state_id NOT IN ('DISCARDED', 'DAMAGED_SEVERE')

INSERT INTO hm_query.product_catalog_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, product_id, product_name, slug, brand, product_status, category_id, category_name, base_price, selling_price, primary_sku, primary_image_url, seller_id, seller_name, avg_rating, review_count, total_available_qty, stock_status, conversion_rate, views_30d ) SELECT p.id, p.tenant, NOW(), p.id, p.name, p.slug, p.brand, p.state_id, p.category_id, COALESCE(c.name, ''), p.base_price, COALESCE((SELECT o.selling_price FROM hm_offer.offer o WHERE o.product_id = p.id AND o.state_id = 'LIVE' ORDER BY o.selling_price ASC LIMIT 1), p.base_price), (SELECT pv.sku FROM hm_product.product_variants pv WHERE pv.product_id = p.id ORDER BY pv.sku LIMIT 1), (SELECT ma.cdn_url FROM hm_media.media_assets ma JOIN hm_media.product_media pm ON pm.asset_id = ma.id WHERE pm.product_id = p.id AND pm.is_primary = true LIMIT 1), p.supplier_id, COALESCE(s.business_name, ''), COALESCE((SELECT AVG(r.rating) * 100 FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id AND r.state_id = 'PUBLISHED')::INT, 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_review.product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = p.id AND r.state_id = 'PUBLISHED'), 0), COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.available_quantity) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id), 0), CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.available_quantity) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id), 0) = 0 THEN 'OUT_OF_STOCK' WHEN COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.available_quantity) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id), 0) < COALESCE((SELECT MIN(inv.low_stock_threshold) FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv WHERE inv.product_id = p.id), 5) THEN 'LOW_STOCK' ELSE 'IN_STOCK' END, 0, 0 FROM hm_product.products p LEFT JOIN hm_product.categories c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN hm_supplier.supplier s ON p.supplier_id = s.id
